calendar.matters:
Petition To Declare Property In Trust
Off Calendar Sep-28-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Knudsen for and with Kristina Hall.

The Court stated that it reviewed the additional documents that were submitted and that it was prepared to grant the petition. The Court granted the Petition to Declare Property in Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Declare Property In Trust
Off Calendar Sep-12-2012 Continued To Sep-19-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Derek Knudsen for and with Kristina Hall (Petitioner).

Mr. Knudsen stated that the date change on the Trust was a typograghical error and that Kristina Hall has a Power of Attorney for Brooke Brownback. The Court suggested Mr. Knudsen obtain a declaration from one of the Parties who witnessed the will indicating Brooke's intent to create the Trust. The Petition to Declare Property In Trust was continued to September 19, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for a declaration or the Power of Attorney.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

Petition To Declare Property In Trust
Off Calendar Aug-22-2012 Continued To Sep-12-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
